examples: Even such a little garden as this was considered in the metropolis of Copenhagen as a great luxury.
The copying-clerk came to Copenhagen as guest, or rather as prisoner in a family living in Gother Street.
Copenhagen covered 30% of investment costs, and guaranteed loans for large turbine exporters such as Vestas.
The once unstoppable green machine lost its mojo at the Climate Change Conference in Copenhagen.
Post-Copenhagen greens need to reassess their relations with people in the developed countries as well.
